description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: build and release. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt 5.15.2 and dependencies, sets up kColorPicker and kImageAnnotator, builds the project, runs tests, and uploads build artifacts. The release job depends on build, creates a prerelease with a given body and name.
